This is a pre-existing test configuration issue, not introduced by any feature.

blockingIssues.description: Orphaned Go source files STILL EXIST in apps/api/internal/. The foundation-fix-1-orphans review confirmed the fix was marked PASS but Go files were found remaining. A pending task 'foundation-fix-1-orphans-force' exists but has not been executed yet. 9 Go source files remain at apps/api/internal/httpapi/, apps/api/internal/auth/, apps/api/internal/config/.
blockingIssues.evidence: find apps/api/internal -name '*.go' returns 9 files - NO CHANGE from round 4

blockingIssues.description: Missing translation keys for fitness step validation cause runtime crashes. Translation key 'onboarding.steps.fitness.genderRequired' at page.tsx:159 and 'onboarding.steps.fitness.levelRequired' at page.tsx:163 are used but NOT defined in i18n.ts. User attempting to proceed past step 5 without selecting gender/fitness level will encounter runtime crash. NO FIX APPLIED since round 4.
blockingIssues.evidence: grep for genderRequired in i18n.ts returns no matches - keys missing

blockingIssues.description: Bug in get_attempt_rank function. When user_score falls between two scores in the sorted attempts list, the loop doesn't break early and rank gets incorrectly incremented. Example: attempts=[100,80,60], user_score=70 should give rank 3 but loop produces rank=4. The formula rank=i+2 is also inconsistent - should be count of strictly higher scores + 1. NO FIX APPLIED since round 4.
blockingIssues.evidence: Code at lines 389-395 shows the bug: no break after incrementing rank, continues loop incorrectly

blockingIssues.description: Dashboard stats (reports_count, total_lessons_completed, total_tests_taken) are hardcoded to 0 instead of querying actual database tables. Admin panel shows fake data. NO FIX APPLIED since round 4.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary rule: ALL orphaned files from a previous implementation approach (Go files in this case) must be deleted atomically when switching languages. Not just module files (go.mod, go.sum) but ALL source files. Workers must verify deletion with 'find apps/api/internal -name "*.go"' before marking complete. The foundation-fix-1-orphans was marked complete but only removed go.mod/go.sum, not the source .go files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-fix-1-orphans-force pending task exists to actually delete the Go files. The issue was that the original fix only removed go.mod/go.sum but left 9 .go source files.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add validation step that workers must run the application with actual user flows and verify no runtime crashes occur. Missing translation keys could be caught by starting the dev server and attempting the actual user flow with the validation error path.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: student-onboarding missing translation keys (genderRequired, levelRequired) - these would cause runtime crashes when user tries to proceed past step 5. Typecheck/lint don't catch missing i18n keys.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add requirement to verify rank/percentile calculation logic with unit tests covering edge cases (score between two attempts, score equal to highest, empty attempts list). The get_attempt_rank bug was not caught because tests passed with simple cases.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mock-test-engine has blocking rank calculation bug that wasn't caught. The test suite tests percentiles with first/last/middle but doesn't test intermediate scores properly.

testConfigurationIssues.frontend: Test files use vitest imports but project uses Jest. auth.test.ts imports from 'vitest', dashboard.test.tsx/onboarding.test.tsx use 'vi' from 'jest' (should be jest.fn()). TypeScript type annotations in mock functions cause parse errors. Pre-existing configuration issue requiring jest.config.ts setup with TypeScript/vitest support.
testConfigurationIssues.backend: Test fixtures in test_admin_users.py don't create required tables before tests run. 83 of 90 tests pass. 7 admin user tests fail due to fixture setup issue (no such table: users). Pre-existing test fixture issue.

notes: This is round 5. No new fix features have been created or completed since round 4. The pending task foundation-fix-1-orphans-force has not been executed. All blocking issues from round 4 remain unresolved. Orchestrator needs to ensure fix tasks are executed before next scrutiny run.
